description: You are an archivist at a Special Collections library. Format the Susan B. Anthony Papers finding aid (/home/ga/Documents/sba_finding_aid.odt) according to the DACS style guide at /home/ga/Desktop/dacs_style_guide.txt. The text is complete but currently unformatted. The final document must feature a centered, bold title (>=16pt), Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles applied to the specified sections, and justified narrative body paragraphs. Subject terms must be formatted as a bulleted list, and the pipe-separated container list must be replaced with a 4-column table featuring a bold header row. Save the document when complete. The document is already open in Calligra Words.

body_alignment_samples: Susan Brownell Anthony was a prominent American civil rights leader
In 1851, she met Elizabeth Cady Stanton
The papers of Susan B. Anthony span the years 1846-1906
